description: Permissions for changing budgets, limits, billing policies and pay-as-you-go related configuration.

permissions.reason: Read usage and governance reports needed before billing or budget changes.
Resolve owners and authorized change approvers for billing workflows.
Read app and service principal context for governance and change impact.
Read registered agents before budget or billing related changes.
Perform approved changes affecting agent registration or governance state where supported.
Read Copilot package metadata in application contexts.
Modify app catalog entries (block/install) in application contexts.
Apply approved changes to Copilot package metadata where supported.
Read Limited Mode settings during signed-in billing or capacity review flows.
Change Limited Mode settings only after dry-run and explicit approval.
Read Copilot policy settings for billing and capacity impact review.
Change Copilot policy settings only after dry-run and explicit approval.
Read reports in signed-in billing review flows.
Read registered agents in signed-in billing review flows.
Perform approved delegated agent changes where required by API.
Read Copilot package metadata in signed-in billing review flows.
Change Copilot package metadata only after dry-run and explicit approval.
Modify app catalog entries (block/install) in delegated sessions.
Enable approved signed-in WorkIQ agent query flows. The WorkIQ service principal is only a prerequisite resource, not a separate app profile.

notes: BillingChange is the only profile marked for budget or billing changes.
WorkIQ is tracked as a prerequisite service principal only.
